scene_input.scene_summary: Prophet Muhammad and the Muslims prepare to meet with other tribes.
scene_input.key_visual_action: Prophet Muhammad holding a scroll with the Quran, surrounded by Muslims with maps and flags.

schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 253
schema_output.moral_lesson: Unity and cooperation in the face of challenges bring hope and success.

characters.name: the central figure
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, one hand extended in a gentle reassuring gesture

characters.name: Muslims
characters.appearance: slender build, various thobes and cloaks, some with head coverings, standing and sitting around the central figure, holding maps, flags, and other objects

schema_output.narrative_text: The Prophet Muhammad and his companions were preparing to meet with other tribes to share the message of Islam. They were hopeful that their unity and cooperation would bring success.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A serene desert landscape with a small oasis in the background, featuring a cluster of palm trees and a clear blue sky with a few wispy clouds. Late afternoon golden sunlight casts a warm glow on the scene, with long shadows stretching across the sand. In the foreground, a group of Muslims stand and sit around the central figure, seen entirely from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, one hand extended in a gentle reassuring gesture. The Muslims hold various objects such as maps, flags, and scrolls, with one of them holding a large, open scroll with a sacred text. Soft warm golden light, hopeful and optimistic mood. Medium wide shot at eye level. Warm beige, cream, and golden palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
